data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Hybrid participation parity (remote can ask questions, vote)', but the evidence does not confirm that remote participants can actively engage in asking questions or voting. While the linked use case mentions that hand-raising works both ways and polls include all participants, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the functionality of these features in practice. Therefore, this step reveals a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming that remote participants can ask questions or vote during the session.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
